zh.lifeSummary: Robert of Essex Lord of Rayleigh是Swein de Essex和Margaret De Rie的兒子，於大約1065年出生在英國艾可雷利。他於大約1108年與Gunnora of Essex結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1132年在英國英格蘭素福爾可豪利享年69歲，埋葬在英國。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Robert of Essex Lord of Rayleigh是Swein de Essex和Margaret De Rie的儿子，于大约1065年出生在英国艾可雷利。他于大约1108年与Gunnora of Essex结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1132年在英国英格兰素福爾可豪利享年69岁，埋葬在英国。

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

nameMeanings.name: Essex
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from the county of Essex, whose name is from Old English ēast ‘east’ + Seaxe ‘Saxons’. In England, the surname is now particularly common in Birmingham.

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: Robert of Essex Lord of Rayleigh was born about 1065, in Rayleigh, Essex, England as the son of Swein de Essex and Margaret De Rie. He married Gunnora of Essex about 1108. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. He died about 1132, in Haughley, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 69, and was buried in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Robert of Essex Lord of Rayleigh est né environ 1065, à Rayleigh, Essex, Angleterre, fils de Swein d’Essex et Margaret De Rie. Il a épousé Gunnora of Essex environ 1108. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé environ 1132, à Haughley, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterré à Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Robert of Essex Lord of Rayleigh wurde um 1065 in Rayleigh, Essex, England, als Sohn von Swein de Essex und Margaret De Rie geboren. Er hat um 1108 Gunnora of Essex geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1132 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Haughley, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Robert of Essex Lord of Rayleigh è nato il circa 1065 nel Rayleigh, Essex, England come figlio di Swein de Essex e Margaret De Rie. Lui sposato Gunnora of Essex circa 1108. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1132, nel Haughley, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolto a England.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert of Essex Lord of Rayleighは約1065年にイギリスエセックスレイレイグでSwein de EssexとMargaret De Rieの息子として生まれた。約1108年にGunnora of Essexと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は約1132年にイギリスイギリススフォルクハウリーで69歳で死去し，イギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert of Essex Lord of Rayleigh(은)는 대략 1065년 영국 에세스 라일리에서 Swein de Essex(와)과 Margaret De Rie의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1108년 Gunnora of Essex(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1132년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 하우그h리에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Robert of Essex Lord of Rayleigh nasceu aproximadamente 1065, em Rayleigh, Essex, Inglaterra filho de Swein de Essex e Margaret De Rie. Ele casou-se com Gunnora of Essex aproximadamente 1108. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1132, em Haughley, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 69 anos, e foi sepultado em Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Robert of Essex Lord of Rayleigh родился около 1065 г. в местности реилиг, эссекс, Англия. Его родителей звали Swein de Essex и Margaret De Rie. Он женился на женщине по имени Gunnora of Essex около 1108 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер около 1132 г. в местности холи, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 69 лет и был похоронен в местности Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Robert of Essex Lord of Rayleigh nació aproximadamente 1065, en Rayleigh, Essex, Inglaterra como hijo de Swein de Essex y Margaret De Rie. Se casó con Gunnora of Essex aproximadamente 1108. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1132, en Haughley, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultado en Inglaterra.
